title: Why Do You Burn?
description: Makes some item fireproof, when their use, appearance or origin makes sense.
body:
![Alex dropping blaze powder in lava by accident and trying to catch it.](https://github.com/888Roses/WhyDoYouBurn/blob/master/assets/banner_with_title.png?raw=true)
# 🤔 What is Why Do You Burn? Why Do You Burn? is a mod which makes some item fireproof, when their use, appearance or origin makes sense. # 💡 Features ## 🔥 Base Fireproof Items Those items are now fireproof: - Blaze Powder - Blaze Rods - Magma Cream - Magma Block - Obsidian - Crying Obsidian - Dragon Egg - Dragon Head - Wither Skeleton Skull - Lava Chicken Music Disc - Tears Music Disc - Pigstep Music Disc ## 🏷️ Fireproof Item Tag Fireproof items are now a tag (why_do_you_burn:fireproof) that you can add to any item using a datapack! # ❓ Q&A
This item should be fireproof in the base mod! Simply join the discord and ask for it to be added in the suggestions channel, and I might add it. Also remember that you can make a datapack and add the fireproof item that way!
Can I use this in my modpack? Yes.
I have an issue. Where can I report it? Issues can be reported in the help channel of the Discord.
Can you port this to Forge/Neoforge/Quilt? No. I only make mods for Fabric and won't port them for other mod loaders. If you want to make a branch of Legion for another loader, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
Can you backport the mod to version `x.xx`? No. I make mods for the latest version of the game and will not backport them. Similarly to Question 1, if you want to make a branch of Why Do You Burn? for another version of the game, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
